channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US Investigates Potential Smuggling of Nvidia Chips to Alibaba Through Thailand
item.description: According to reports, U.S. authorities are investigating a potential case of Nvidia computer chips being smuggled to Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba through Thailand. The suspected smuggling highligh...

item.title: Ottawa Weather Forecast: Sunny Periods with Possible Showers This Weekend
item.description: Ottawa residents can expect a weekend featuring mostly sunny skies with occasional showers. The forecast indicates a mix of clear periods and brief rain showers, making it a typical spring weekend for...

item.title: National Commission for Women recommends ban on parole for rape and serious sexual offence convicts along with justice system reforms
item.description: The National Commission for Women has announced that it will urge the Union Government to impose a complete ban on parole for individuals convicted of rape, aggravated sexual assault, and other grave ...

item.title: The Economic and Social Impact of Organised Crime in South Africa
item.description: South Africa is facing a profound challenge as organised crime increasingly functions as a parallel system of governance. Criminal networks in urban and vulnerable areas now dictate economic activity,...

item.title: Iran's yuan-denominated tariffs in the Strait of Hormuz and their potential impact on the petrodollar system
item.description: Recent developments in the Strait of Hormuz highlight significant shifts in global energy trade and currency dynamics amid ongoing tensions. Following blockades by Iran and the United States, the US h...

item.title: Duterte Set to Meet Successor Lawyer Following Kaufman's Withdrawal from ICC Case
item.description: Former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte is preparing to meet the new lawyer selected to represent him in the International Criminal Court (ICC) after British-Israeli attorney Nicholas Kaufman requ...

item.title: Deceased Storage Wars Cast Members: Mark Balelo, Moe Prigoff, Gunter Nezhoda and Darrell Sheets
item.description: Storage Wars, the popular reality TV show featuring intense auctions of abandoned storage units, has lost several colourful cast members over the years. As of 2026, four notable figures from the serie...

item.title: Islamabad Traffic Advisory Issued for Marka-e-Haq Anniversary Event on May 10
item.description: The Islamabad administration has issued a detailed traffic diversion plan for May 10, 2026, ahead of the first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq, commemorating Pakistan’s response to the 19-day military conf...

item.title: Atiku Secures ADC Presidential Nomination Form for 2027 Elections
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don officially collect him payment receipt to purchase the African Democratic Congress (ADC) presidential nomination form as e dey prepare for the 2027 general ele...

item.title: Cal Fire Firefighter Charged with Multiple Rapes, Including Alleged Six-Hour Assault at Temecula Station
item.description: A 51-year-old Cal Fire firefighter and paramedic, David Renteria, has been charged with raping three women, including one in a prolonged assault that allegedly took place at Fire Station 96 in Temecul...

item.title: MIT Student Demonstrates Rapid Learning Method Using NotebookLM
item.description: A graduate student at MIT recently demonstrated a method to master an entirely new subject in just 48 hours using Google’s NotebookLM. Instead of asking for simple summaries, the student uploaded six ...

item.title: Researchers Identify Key Genes for Limb Regeneration in Animals
item.description: Scientists from Wake Forest University, Duke University, and the University of Wisconsin-Madison have identified a set of genes, called SP genes, that are crucial for limb regeneration in axolotls, ze...

item.title: Kisumu Police Arrest Burglary Suspect Armed with Sword on Rooftop at Holo Trading Centre
item.description: In Kisumu County, police officers from Holo Police Station acted fast and managed to foil a burglary attempt at Holo Trading Centre. The incident happened when a security guard spotted suspicious move...

item.title: DILG States No Confirmation Received Yet on Alleged ICC Arrest Warrant for Senator Bato Dela Rosa
item.description: The Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG) announced that they have not received any official information regarding the alleged arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Cour...

item.title: Eon Systems Simulates a Fruit Fly Brain, Exploring New Paths Toward AI
item.description: Eon Systems has announced a groundbreaking experiment in which the complete brain of a fruit fly has been digitally replicated and connected to a simulated fly body. Using the detailed connectome of a...

item.title: Minister Kapinga directs TBS to manage resources well after receiving 11 new vehicles
item.description: Dar es Salaam. Tanzania's Minister for Industry and Trade, Ms Judith Kapinga, has instructed the Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) to use its resources carefully and for official duties only. This di...

item.title: Keir Starmer appoints Gordon Brown as Special Envoy on Global Finance and Harriet Harman as adviser on women and girls after Labour's local election losses
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer is under significant pressure following Labour's poor performance in the 2026 local elections, where the party lost over 1,300 seats in England and power in Wales to Plaid Cymru after...

item.title: Understanding the Challenges Behind Nigerian Graduates’ Employability
item.description: For Nigeria, wahala dey when e come to graduates and work. Moniepoint CEO, Tosin Eniolorunda, talk say him company get 500 job positions wey dem no fit fill. E blame young people, saying dem no get gl...

item.title: ICC clarifies no public arrest warrants have been issued in the Philippines
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has clarified that no public arrest warrants have been issued in the Philippines. This statement comes amid ongoing discussions and reports regarding potential l...

item.title: WHO Chief Oversees Safe Disembarkation of Passengers from Cruise Ship Affected by Hantavirus in Canary Islands
item.description: The Director-General of the World Health Organisation, Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, has arrived in Spain to join senior government officials for the safe evacuation of passengers and crew from the MV H...
